expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: In result.md: “This benchmark asserts that Phase 7 … derives a developer smoke checklist from P1 and [ANALOG-GATE] scenarios.” and “finalPlanSummary.mjs explicitly extracts developer smoke checklist rows … scenarios tagged <P1>; or … [ANALOG-GATE].” Also: “extractDeveloperSmokeRows(...) includes a scenario row only if /<P1>/i matches … or /\[ANALOG-GATE\]/i matches.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: In result.md: “Primary phase under test: phase7” and the verdict section states “PASS… Output aligns with primary phase phase7… The developer smoke deliverable is explicitly a Phase 7 output… generating code is inside the Phase 7 summary generator module (finalPlanSummary.mjs).” Execution_notes.md similarly: “Phase 7 includes an implemented mechanism to generate context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md…”
